_comment: Context7: up-to-date, version-specific library/framework docs on demand. Uses `bunx` (not `npx`) because the meta-managed JS runtime is Bun and the bundled `npx` is non-functional. Get a key at context7.com and set it via the CONTEXT7_API_KEY env var — do NOT commit the literal key. Merge into .claude/settings.json (Claude Code) or claude_desktop_config.json (Claude Desktop).
